patches.summary: Validate resourceType via parameterized sqlite_master lookup before interpolating into SELECT in Store.ListIDs.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged the raw fmt.Sprintf table interpolation as a SQL injection sink (P1). The same fix landed in the generator's store.go.tmpl so it won't regress on regen.

patches.summary: --since last-sync reads store.GetLastSyncedAt("events") instead of hardcoding now-24h.
patches.reason: Greptile (P1) — the advertised semantics of `last-sync` is 'since the last delta-sync ran', not 'last day'. Without this the window silently lies whenever sync ran more or less than 24h ago.

patches.summary: Add end-time divergence check parallel to the existing start-time check in recurring-drift.
patches.reason: Greptile (P1) — recurring-drift advertised catching shortened/extended occurrences but only inspected start times, so durations could drift silently.

patches.summary: Push start/end window into the SQL WHERE clause via json_extract in loadEvents.
patches.reason: Greptile (P2) — conflicts/freetime/prep previously pulled the entire events table into memory and filtered in Go; on accounts with multi-year history this is unnecessary. SQL bounds are coarse (UTC-shaped strings) and the Go-side overlap filter remains the precise gate.

patches.summary: Snapshot len(matches) into totalCount before --recent truncation so `with` reports the full shared-event count, not the displayed slice.
patches.reason: Greptile (P1) — Count was assigned after matches[:recent], so the headline 'how often have I met with this person' stat silently capped at --recent (default 10). A user with 100 shared meetings saw `count: 10`.
